    1. build(OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator, SLExpression, SLExpression)

Interface OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperatorHandler

All Known Implementing Classes:
DoubleHandler, FloatHandler, IntegerHandler, LDTHandler, OverloadedOperatorHandler.LocSetHandler, OverloadedOperatorHandler.SequenceHandler
Enclosing class:
OverloadedOperatorHandler
public static interface OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperatorHandler
Functional interface that defines how JML arithmetic operators are overloaded for particular arguments.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable SLExpression
    build(OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator op, SLExpression left, SLExpression right)
    Apply the provided arguments to the operator which corresponds to the given JML operator.

  • Method Details

    • build

      @Nullable SLExpression build(OverloadedOperatorHandler.JMLOperator op, SLExpression left, SLExpression right) throws SLTranslationException
      Apply the provided arguments to the operator which corresponds to the given JML operator.
      Parameters:
      op - the JML operator
      left - left side of the binary expression
      right - right side of the binary expression, null if op is unary.
      Returns:
      null if this handler is not able to do the translation.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - if translation fails (incompatible types e.g.)
